events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need answer JSON only. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Scenario: orange cable handling violations. High-voltage safety. Work rough-complete. Need assess compliance. Orange cables are HV cables; handling violations likely non-compliant. Since dangerous or non-compliant => fail. Risk high or critical? Orange cable handling violations could be critical due to shock/electrocution. But maybe high. Need component_conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Findings: orange HV cable handling violations, improper routing/securing/protection, potential insulation damage. Actions: de-energize, inspect, correct routing, install proper support/grommets, re-insulate/replace damaged cables, verify clearance/protection per OEM, retest/inspect before energization. Rationale: HV orange cables must be handled per OEM and NFPA 70E to prevent insulation damage and shock; observed violations create shock/fire hazard. References: OEM HV procedures, NFPA 70E, maybe SAE J2344? But reference material says OEM HV procedures, NFPA 70E-adjacent. Use those. percent_complete maybe 70. confidence 0.9. event_time 0, rate 0, sound_source "", order [], workable [].

Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.
